findings.criterion: `tests/scripts/test_backfill_caused_by.py` passes: the script links the single-culprit bug and skips the ambiguous one (`assert links == 1`).
findings.detail: The file `tests/scripts/test_backfill_caused_by.py` contains only one test (`test_proposes_single_culprit`), which tests a single-culprit bug only. It does NOT include an ambiguous bug in its fixture, does NOT assert that the ambiguous case is skipped, and there is no `assert links == 1` anywhere in the file. The ambiguous-skipping test is only in the separate heldout file (`test_backfill_caused_by_heldout.py::test_ambiguous_bug_no_proposal`), which the AC says belongs in the main test file.

findings.criterion: the backfill actually executes end-to-end: the test invokes the script's entry point (write mode) over a fixture store of two closed bugs (one single-culprit, one ambiguous) and asserts exactly ONE caused_by link is drawn.
findings.detail: No test in either `test_backfill_caused_by.py` or `test_backfill_caused_by_heldout.py` uses a fixture containing BOTH a single-culprit bug AND an ambiguous bug together, then asserts exactly ONE caused_by link. The heldout `test_write_is_idempotent` uses a single-bug fixture and only asserts `n1 >= 1` (not `== 1`). The single-culprit and ambiguous tests are in separate test functions with separate fixtures, which means the 'exactly one from two' end-to-end assertion is absent.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
